rules._comment: Reference/documentation artifact — Firebase does not read this file automatically. Paste this whole JSON object into the Firebase console's Realtime Database > Rules tab (see README.md's 'Watch Together backend setup' section). These rules govern ONLY the extension client's direct access, which is authenticated with a Worker-issued custom-token-derived ID token carrying a `roomCode` custom claim. The Worker itself writes using its Firebase Admin SDK (service-account) credentials, which are an admin-equivalent identity that always bypasses Realtime Database security rules entirely — the rules below never apply to the Worker's own reads/writes.
